findings.evidence: `HarmonicBall.lean:45-52` proves the translation ball case directly; `HarmonicBall.lean:56-66` proves the general `x + c • y` ball-radius statement from which the translation case follows at `c = 1`.
findings.fix: Move the affine ball-radius theorem before the translation lemma, then prove the translation lemma by `simpa [one_smul, add_comm]` from `harmonicOnNhd_comp_const_add_smul_ball_radius_iff (c := 1)`.
findings.issue: `harmonicOnNhd_comp_add_right_ball_zero_iff` is a special case of the later affine ball theorem with `c = 1`, but it repeats its own preimage/proof instead of deriving the special case from the general result.

summary: The affine set-level API is now present, but the ball file still proves a translation ball special case separately from the affine ball theorem it also adds.
